name: Jagadguru Ramanandacharya Swami Rajendra Das Ji Maharaj
title: Peethadhishwar, Malook Peeth (Vrindavan)
bio: Revered Mahant of Malook Peeth, known for scholarly and emotional kathas with special focus on Bhaktamal (lives of saints) and perpetual seva via Malook Peeth's Sada Vrat.

ashram.name: Shri Malook Peeth (Prachin)
ashram.address: Shri Malook Peeth, Bansivat, Parikrama Marg, Vrindavan, Mathura, Uttar Pradesh - 281121, India.

visitorNote: If visiting Malook Peeth, try to attend during panghat/community feast time; the Sada Vrat food distribution is a special part of the ashram's seva.

name: Shri Pundrik Goswami Ji
title: Acharya, Radharaman Tradition
bio: 38th Acharya in the Gaudiya Vaishnava parampara. Known for Bhagwat Katha and youth-focused spiritual talks with clear, modern reasoning.

ashram.name: Vaijayanti Ashram (Vaijayanti Sewa Sansthan Trust)
ashram.address: Vaijayanti Ashram, Gyan Gudri, Vrindavan, Mathura, Uttar Pradesh - 281121, India.
ashram.mapsQuery: Vaijayanti Ashram Sri Pundrik Goswami Ji

name: Morari Bapu
title: Ram Katha Vyas
bio: Globally renowned Ramcharitmanas exponent. Core message: Satya (Truth), Prem (Love), Karuna (Compassion).

ashram.name: Shree Chitrakutdham Trust
ashram.address: Talgajarda, Mahuva, District Bhavnagar, Gujarat - 364290, India.

name: Jaya Kishori
title: Spiritual Orator
bio: Spiritual orator and singer, known for Shrimad Bhagwat Katha and Nani Bai Ro Mayra. Focuses on family values and practical spirituality for youth.

office.note: No public ashram address; events are announced on official channels. Bookings via website.

name: Pujya Shri Hit Premanand Govind Sharan Ji Maharaj
title: Vrindavan Rasik Sant
bio: Revered saint of the Radhavallabh sampradaya in Vrindavan. Known for Bhajan Marg satsang, Naam Jap, and practical guidance rooted in Shri Radha-Rani bhakti.

ashram.name: Shri Hit Radha Kripa Punj
ashram.address: Shri Hit Radha Kripa Punj, Varaha Ghat, Parikrama Marg, Vrindavan, Mathura, Uttar Pradesh - 281121, India.

visitorNote: Due to health considerations, close contact may be regulated. Many devotees take darshan during early morning parikrama.

name: Pt. Dhirendra Krishna Shastri
title: Peethadhishwar, Bageshwar Dham
bio: Peethadhishwar of Bageshwar Dham Sarkar (Hanuman). Known for Divya Darbar and Hanumant Katha; announcements and token schedules are posted on official channels.

ashram.name: Bageshwar Dham Swayambhu Hanuman Temple
ashram.address: Village Garha (Ganjan), Tehsil Rajnagar, District Chhatarpur, Madhya Pradesh - 471105, India.

visitorNote: Divya Darbar is usually held on Tuesdays and Saturdays; expect large crowds. Check official channels for token distribution and schedules.

name: Pt. Indresh Upadhyay
title: Bhagwat Katha Vyas, Sankirtan Vocalist
bio: Young and widely followed Bhagwat Katha Vyas known for melodious Sankirtan-style narration and the Bhakti Path movement; emphasizes Gau Seva and youth-oriented cultural values.

ashram.name: Bhakti Path Ashram (Bhakti Path Sewa Trust)
ashram.address: Bhakti Path Sewa Trust, Near Vaishno Devi Temple, Parikrama Marg, Vrindavan, Mathura, Uttar Pradesh - 281121, India.

visitorNote: Vrindavan address is primarily a trust/office headquarters; he travels frequently for kathas. Check official Instagram for schedule before visiting.

name: Shri Devkinandan Thakur Ji Maharaj
title: Bhagwat Katha Vyas, Founder (VSSCT)
bio: Prominent Bhagwat Katha narrator and founder of Vishwa Shanti Sewa Charitable Trust (VSSCT). Known for melodious kathas and strong public stance on Sanatan Dharma and social causes (Gau Raksha, cultural preservation).

ashram.name: Shri Priya Kant Ju Mandir (Vishwa Shanti Sewa Charitable Trust)
ashram.address: Shri Priya Kant Ju Mandir, Chhatikara Road, near Vaishno Devi Mandir, Vrindavan, Mathura, Uttar Pradesh - 281121, India.

visitorNote: Temple complex is open daily. Maharaj Ji is often present during major festivals or scheduled katha events; accommodation (dharamshala) is also available on campus.

name: Pujya Shri Aniruddhacharya Ji Maharaj
title: Spiritual Orator
bio: Popular Bhagwat Katha orator known for simple, relatable explanations and seva work via Gauri Gopal Vridhashram (old age home).

ashram.name: Shri Gauri Gopal Ashram (Gauri Gopal Vridhashram)
ashram.address: Shri Gauri Gopal Ashram, Sant Colony, Parikrama Marg, Vrindavan, Mathura, Uttar Pradesh - 281121, India.

visitorNote: Ashram is open to visitors. For donation/volunteering (Vridhashram/Gau Seva), inquire at the office; check official channels for travel and katha schedule.

name: Pujya Rajan Ji Maharaj
title: Ram Katha Vyas
bio: Widely acclaimed Ram Katha narrator known for melodious, bhajan-led recitation of Ramcharitmanas and a strong focus on family values and maryada of Lord Rama.

ashram.name: Shri Ram Katha Prem Yagya Samiti (Office)
ashram.address: Shri Ram Katha Prem Yagya Samiti, 33, Chittaranjan Avenue (C.R. Avenue), Kolkata, West Bengal - 700012, India.

visitorNote: This is an administrative office; Rajan Ji tours for kathas and is rarely present here for darshan. Check official social channels for schedule and locations.

name: Sant Chinmayanand Bapu Ji
title: Kathavachak
bio: Renowned kathakar known for musical Ram Katha and Shrimad Bhagwat Katha. Core message: "Manav Sewa Madhav Sewa"; associated with Vishwa Kalyan Mission Trust and its humanitarian work (gaushala, education, leprosy care).

ashram.name: Vishwa Kalyan Mission Trust (Chinmay Dham)
ashram.address: Vishwa Kalyan Mission Trust, Near Shankaracharya Chowk, Kankhal, Haridwar, Uttarakhand - 249408, India.

visitorNote: Ashram/trust in Haridwar is open for visitors and seva; Bapu Ji may be traveling for kathas. Check official social channels for schedule.

name: Pt. Pradeep Mishra (Sehore Wale)
title: Shiv Mahapuran Kathavachak
bio: Widely followed kathavachak known for Shiva-centered kathas and large devotional gatherings.

name: Swami Vijay Kaushal Ji Maharaj
title: Bhagwat Kathavachak
bio: Senior Bhagwat kathavachak known for traditional scriptural exposition and devotional pravachans.

name: Pujya Shri Prem Bhushan Ji Maharaj
title: Ram Katha Vyas
bio: Widely respected Ram Katha narrator and bhajan singer known for simple, participatory satsang and samuhik sankirtan. Popular for the bhajan "Hum Ram Ji Ke, Ram Ji Hamare Hain" and the "Hum Ram Ji Ke" movement.

ashram.name: Shri Ram Kripa Dham (Hum Ram Ji Ke Trust)
ashram.address: Shri Ram Kripa Dham, Near Karsevakpuram, Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh - 224123, India.

visitorNote: Ashram is near Karsevakpuram. Maharaj Ji travels frequently for kathas; check official site/social channels for schedule before visiting.

name: Bhaishree Rameshbhai Oza
title: Bhagwat Kathakar, Educationist
specialty: Shrimad Bhagwat Katha, Vedic Scripture Exposition
bio: One of India's most senior and respected kathakars, known for intellectual and calm exposition of Shrimad Bhagwat rooted in Vedic scriptures. Founder of Sandipani Vidyaniketan (Porbandar), a large campus combining rishikul-style learning (Sanskrit, Vedas) with modern education, guided by the motto: Vidya Prapti, Sadbuddhi, and Seva.

ashram.name: Sandipani Vidyaniketan
ashram.address: Sandipani Vidyaniketan, Maharshi Sandipani Marg, Near Porbandar Airport, Porbandar, Gujarat - 360577, India.

visitorNote: The campus is open to visitors. Shri Hari Mandir is the central attraction for darshan; the atmosphere is disciplined and academic compared to typical ashrams.

name: Jagadguru Rambhadracharya
title: Jagadguru Ramanandacharya
bio: Profound Sanskrit scholar, educator, and founder of Tulsi Peeth (Chitrakoot). Jagadguru Ramanandacharya and a renowned shrutidhara, he has been blind since early infancy and is credited with authoring 100+ books. He is also associated with the Jagadguru Rambhadracharya Divyanga University (for the differently-abled) and received the Padma Vibhushan in 2015.

ashram.name: Tulsi Peeth (Tulsi School for the Blind)
ashram.address: Tulsi Peeth, Janki Kund, Chitrakoot, District Satna, Madhya Pradesh - 485334, India.

visitorNote: Ashram is open to all. If you wish to meet Maharaj Ji, check his schedule beforehand as he travels frequently; he often spends significant time in Chitrakoot, especially during Chaturmas (typically July-October).

name: Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar
title: Spiritual Leader, Art of Living
bio: Founder of the Art of Living Foundation, a volunteer-based humanitarian and educational NGO. Known for making Vedic wisdom practical for modern life and for introducing Sudarshan Kriya, a rhythmic breathing technique central to Art of Living courses worldwide. His vision emphasizes a stress-free, violence-free society and the spirit of Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam (One World Family), with peace and conflict-resolution initiatives in multiple regions.

ashram.name: The Art of Living International Center
ashram.address: The Art of Living International Center, 21st KM, Kanakapura Road, Udayapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka - 560082, India.
ashram.mapsQuery: Art of Living International Center Bengaluru

visitorNote: The ashram is open to visitors daily. You can take a guided tour, visit the goshala, or meditate in the Vishalakshi Mantap. Gurudev travels extensively; check the official site for schedule if you wish to see him in person.

name: Sadhguru Jaggi Vasudev
title: Founder, Isha Foundation
bio: Yogi and mystic, founder of the Isha Foundation, known for presenting yoga and meditation as practical technologies for well-being. Creator of Inner Engineering (including Shambhavi Mahamudra Kriya) and associated with large initiatives such as Project GreenHands, Rally for Rivers, and Save Soil. At Isha Yoga Center he consecrated the Dhyanalinga and established iconic spaces including the Adiyogi Shiva statue.

ashram.name: Isha Yoga Center
ashram.address: Isha Yoga Center, Velliangiri Foothills, Ishana Vihar Post, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu - 641114, India.

visitorNote: The center is open to visitors daily. You can visit Dhyanalinga and Linga Bhairavi temples and see the Adiyogi statue. Teerthakunds (Suryakund for men, Chandrakund for women) are available for a dip; accommodation typically requires advance booking, especially around Mahashivratri.

name: Gauranga Das Prabhu
title: ISKCON Leader, Sustainability Advocate
specialty: Vedic Wisdom for Leadership, Sustainability, Vedic Ecology
bio: ISKCON monk, leadership consultant, and social reformer known for blending modern technology and leadership with Vedic wisdom. IIT Bombay alumnus (B.Tech, Metallurgical Engineering). Director of Govardhan Ecovillage (GEV), an award-winning sustainable community, and associated with ISKCON leadership including roles with ISKCON Chowpatty. His work emphasizes rural development and Vedic Ecology, and he has represented India at ecology and peace forums.

ashram.name: Govardhan Ecovillage (ISKCON Wada)
ashram.address: Govardhan Ecovillage, At. Galtare, Post Hamrapur, Taluka Wada, District Palghar, Maharashtra - 421303, India.

visitorNote: Govardhan Ecovillage is a retreat center and eco-community open to visitors. Day tours and residential retreats (yoga, wellness, Ayurveda) can be booked via their website; it functions more like a holistic wellness and education campus than a typical temple.

name: Radhanath Swami
title: ISKCON Guru, Author, Social Activist
bio: Senior ISKCON monk and spiritual teacher known for bridging Eastern spirituality with global outreach. Born Richard Slavin (Chicago, 1950), his journey from a counter-culture youth to a Vaishnava monk is documented in his book The Journey Home. He inspires major service initiatives including Annamrita (midday meals for schoolchildren), Bhaktivedanta Hospital (holistic healthcare), and Govardhan Ecovillage (sustainability and rural development), while teaching Bhakti Yoga (the yoga of love and devotion).

ashram.name: Radha Gopinath Mandir (ISKCON Chowpatty)
ashram.address: Radha Gopinath Mandir (ISKCON Chowpatty), 7, KM Munshi Marg, Girgaon, Chowpatty, Mumbai, Maharashtra - 400007, India.

visitorNote: If you wish to hear him speak, ISKCON Chowpatty is often the best place to visit (especially during Sunday Feast or major festivals). Due to travel schedule, check the temple's daily program or official website before planning specifically to meet him.

name: Gaur Gopal Das
title: ISKCON Monk, Author, Speaker
bio: ISKCON monk and widely followed motivational speaker known for wit and humor while conveying practical spiritual guidance. Trained in Electrical Engineering (COEP) and joined monastic life in 1996 after a brief corporate stint. Disciple of Radhanath Swami and author of Life's Amazing Secrets, sharing a practical framework for balancing life with devotion and values.

ashram.name: Radha Gopinath Mandir (ISKCON Chowpatty)
ashram.address: Radha Gopinath Mandir (ISKCON Chowpatty), 7, KM Munshi Marg, Girgaon, Chowpatty, Mumbai, Maharashtra - 400007, India.

visitorNote: Although this is his base, he travels frequently for talks. For the best chance to hear him live, track official events and visit during major festivals; unscheduled personal meetings at the temple are unlikely.

name: Amogh Lila Das
title: ISKCON Monk and Youth Mentor
bio: Widely followed monk known for youth-focused spiritual talks and scripture-based practical guidance.

name: Swami Mukundananda
title: JKYog Founder, Spiritual Teacher
bio: Founder of JKYog (Jagadguru Kripalu Yog) and senior disciple of Jagadguru Shree Kripalu Ji Maharaj. Known for teaching yoga for the body, mind, and soul, with a strong focus on mind management and practical, logic-based explanations of Vedic scriptures for professionals and youth. Has an engineering and management background (IIT Delhi, IIM Calcutta) and is associated with initiatives including the upcoming Jagadguru Kripalu University in Odisha.

ashram.name: JKYog Bhakti Ashram
ashram.address: JKYog Bhakti Ashram, Village Banara, Via Mundali Colony, Tehsil Damapada, District Cuttack, Odisha - 754006, India.

links.label: USA HQ: Radha Krishna Temple of Dallas

visitorNote: Swamiji travels extensively between India and the USA for Life Transformation Programs. He is often present at the Dallas temple or the Banara ashram during major retreats or festivals; check the Events section on his website for current location.

name: Swami Ramdev
title: Yoga Guru
bio: Yoga teacher with large public sessions integrating yogic practice and dharmic lifestyle.

name: Acharya Mahamandaleshwar Swami Avdheshanand Giri
title: Juna Akhada Acharya Mahamandaleshwar
bio: Renowned sannyasi and spiritual preceptor with regular discourse and dharmic guidance programs.

name: Pujya Swami Chidanand Saraswati
title: President, Parmarth Niketan
bio: Spiritual leader known for Ganga aarti outreach, yoga discourse, and seva-driven dharmic initiatives.

name: Mahant Swami Maharaj
title: Spiritual Guru, BAPS
bio: Current spiritual guru of BAPS with major satsang assemblies and global devotional outreach.

name: Swami Tejomayananda
title: Former Global Head, Chinmaya Mission
bio: Senior Vedanta teacher of Chinmaya tradition known for scripture teaching and satsang camps.

name: Swami Swaroopananda Saraswati (Chinmaya Mission)
title: Global Head, Chinmaya Mission
bio: Current leader of Chinmaya Mission guiding Vedanta discourse, yajnas, and global satsang programs.

name: Jagadguru Shankaracharya Sri Sri Vidhushekhara Bharati Sannidhanam
title: Dakshinamnaya Sri Sharada Peetham, Sringeri
bio: Current pontiff at Sringeri Sharada Peetham (with blessings of Jagadguru Bharati Tirtha Mahasannidhanam); events are regularly live-streamed.

name: Jagadguru Shankaracharya Swami Nischalananda Saraswati
title: Purvamnaya Govardhan Math, Puri
bio: Pontiff of Govardhan Math, Puri; teachings and programs are distributed through official digital media including YouTube.

name: Jagadguru Shankaracharya Swami Sadananda Saraswati
title: Pashchimamnaya Shri Sharada Peeth, Dwarka
bio: Associated with Sharada Peeth Dwarka lineage; discourse videos and live sessions are available on the math's public YouTube presence.

name: Jagadguru Shankaracharya Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati
title: Uttaramnaya Jyotish Peeth, Joshimath
specialty: Vedanta, Dharma and Public Spiritual Discourse
bio: Publicly known representative associated with Jyotish Peeth tradition; discourse and event clips are distributed on YouTube and media streams.
